reviews.comment:
Un lugar muy tranquilo para pasar el día o acampar, las piletas aún se encuentran en temporada y estan muy buenas. Fogones con parrilla y mesas en un gran bosquecito, baños y vestuarios. Para entrar a las piletas, hay que pasar por una revisación médica, cuya vigencia es de 15 días.

(Translated by Google)
A very peaceful place to spend the day or camp; the pools are still open and in great condition. There are fire pits with grills and tables in a large wooded area, as well as restrooms and changing rooms. To enter the pools, you must pass a medical examination, which is valid for 15 days.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNjVlRU93EAE

reviews.comment:
Fui como invitada la entrada $120 + estacionamiento $120 sin contar la parte de la pileta muy caro por carecer de espacio, las mesas son para 4 personas, el baño todo sucio, no por el personal sino por la calidad de gente, la proveeduría no ofrece prácticamente nada. No lo recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
I went as a guest. The entrance fee was $120 plus $120 for parking, not including the pool area, which was very expensive due to lack of space. The tables only seat four people, and the bathroom was filthy, not because of the staff, but because of the quality of the people there. The concession stand offers practically nothing. I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnb3NiaHNRRRAB
